summary: Wrote flutter-accuracy-validator.py (mirrors ios-accuracy-validator.py). Scans dart fenced blocks for TypeName.member and unknown Amity type refs against flutter.json v1.1 surface. Generated flutter-accuracy-drift.json.
notes: 159 issues. Top unknown types (AmityPostRepository, AmityUserRepository, AmityCommentCreationData) suggest either fabricated or renamed APIs. AmityCoreClient.newClient and .notifications likely surface gaps or renamed constructors. Enum entries (AmityCommentReferenceType.post, AmityPostTargetType.COMMUNITY) may be extractor gaps on enum members. Recommend follow-up triage task parallel to 0032.
